message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-krug" color="cyan" summary="+1 defer convert-to-next-action, keep Step 9 scope tight">
+1 on deferring "convert Waiting For to Next Action." That's a separate interaction on the Waiting For list page, not part of the inbox clarify flow. Keeping Step 9 scoped to inbox -> waiting for is the right call. Track it in deferred items and move on.
</teammate-message>

input.content:
Thanks Steve. Confirmed -- Step 9 is scoped strictly to inbox -> waiting for clarification. The deferred item is tracked in `docs/deferred-items.md`. Also, the announce text "Moved to Waiting For" follows your earlier UX guidance.

Implementation is complete with all tests passing. Ready for your review if you'd like to check the UX flow -- the route handler is in `src/routes/inbox.rs` (search for `waiting_for` branch) and the template is `templates/inbox_item.html`.
input.summary: Confirmed scope, ready for UX review

routing.summary: Confirmed scope, ready for UX review
